# 🧬 Meta Skills

How the system composes itself — attachment architecture, dualities, the harness, the gates. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- [[Agentprivacy Attachment Architecture]] — The three-layer model that binds primary personas to lattice vertices via named cast Mages.

- [[Agentprivacy Dual Agent Harness]] — The operational Swordsman ⊥ Mage autoresearch loop: how to actually RUN dual-agent separation as a self-imp…
- [[Agentprivacy Horizon Gate]] — The held-out-gate discipline: a claimed improvement is worth nothing until it survives an adversarial valid…
- [[Agentprivacy Lattice Coherence]] — The canonical encoding of the 6-dimension sovereignty lattice and the discipline for keeping every repo in …
- [[Agentprivacy Master Emissary]] — Deep philosophical framework for 0xagentprivacy dual-agent architecture.
